title: Heyne-Verlag
content:
{{Top|rwc}}
[[File:Heyne-Verlag.svg|thumb|right|211px]]
'''Heyne-Verlag''', known simply as '''Heyne''', is a [[Wikipedia:Germany|German]]-based publishing imprint of [[Random House]]. From 1994 to 2002, they were the secondary publisher responsible for printing the [[Wikipedia:German language|German]] translations of ''[[Star Wars]]'' books, while the status of Primary publisher was first held by [[Goldmann Verlag|Goldmann]] and later by [[Blanvalet]]. 

{{Company-stub|real}}
